resources.string: Off
10 Sec
5 Sec
30 Sec
Processing...
OK
Self-timer
No memory card inserted.
No space on the memory card.
20 Sec
Use this application with SteadyShot of lens off.
Simple
Invalid with this application.
Light paintings
To the 1st shooting
To the 2nd shooting
This function is currently disabled.\nAvailable in the third shooting.
This function is disabled in this step.
This function is currently disabled.\nAvailable in the first shooting.
Redraw light traces?
Extracted light traces.
Superimposed light traces w/ background.
Redo
Back to the first shooting.\nDiscard the light traces.
End shooting?\nDiscard the light traces.
Back to the first shooting.

End shooting? Discards the light traces.
To check the shooting result without
discarding the light traces,
use the review function.
Back to the second shooting.\nRetake the light traces.
Acquiring preparation image.\nDo not move the device.
Draw traces with light within the\ndisplayed time.
1. Shoot a preparation image for\nlight extraction.
2. Press the shutter and draw traces\nwith light.
3. Shoot background or portrait images\nto be superimposed with light traces.
You can easily create light paintings by simply setting the amount of time to draw light traces.
Sets the time to draw light traces to\n10 seconds.
Sets the time to draw light traces to\n10 seconds.\nSuitable for drawing small illustrations.

Sets the time to draw light traces to
20 seconds. When the paint time is long,
you can beautifully draw light traces
shooting in dark environments.
Sets the time to draw light traces to\n20 seconds.\nSuitable for drawing large illustrations.

Sets the time to draw light traces to
30 seconds. When the paint time is long,
you can beautifully draw light traces
shooting in dark environments.

Sets the time to draw light traces to
30 seconds. With diverse ideas,
you can create various types of
light paintings using this setting.
Sets the time to draw light traces to\n5 seconds.

Sets the time to draw light traces to
5 seconds.
Suitable for drawing short words or
symbols.
End the current shootings and back to the first shooting.\nDiscard the light traces.
Back to the second shooting.\nRetake the light traces.
Stabilize the device with a tripod.\n1 image is created out of 3 shots.\nFirst, shoot a preparation image to extract light traces.
Shoots light traces drawn using penlights, etc.\nDraw light traces within the set paint time.\nAfter this step, only the light traces are displayed.

Shoots light traces drawn using penlights, etc.
Draw light traces within the set paint time.
After this step, the light traces are extracted.
Power save function is disabled.

Shoots light traces drawn using penlights, etc.
Draw light traces within the set paint time.
After this step, the light traces are extracted.
Power save function is disabled.

If any of the following results occur after this step, try again from the first shooting.
- the extracted light traces are cut
- the background remains

Shoots light traces drawn using penlights, etc.
Draw light traces within the set paint time.
After this step, the light traces are extracted.
Power save function is disabled.
Shoots background or portrait images to be superimposed with light traces.\nCheck the position of the displayed light trace when shooting.

Shoots background or portrait images to be superimposed with light traces.
Check the position of the displayed light trace when shooting.
Shooting mode is program auto.
Power save function is disabled.

Shoots background or portrait images to be superimposed with light traces.
Check the position of the displayed light trace when shooting.
Shooting mode is program auto.
Power save function is disabled.

Shoots light traces drawn using penlights, etc.
Draw light traces within the set paint time.
After this step, only the light traces are displayed.
You cannot change the exposure settings with the settings of the first shot.

Shoots background or portrait images to be superimposed with light traces.\nCheck the position of the displayed light trace when shooting.\nYou can change the exposure settings with the settings of the first shot.
Sets the time to draw light traces.
Sets whether to turn on or off the countdown sound played during the paint time.
Does not play the countdown sound during the paint time.
Plays the countdown sound during the paint time.
Displays the guide for shooting light paintings with this application.
Shoots light traces drawn using penlights, etc.\nStabilize the device with a tripod and draw light traces within the set paint time.
Shoot only extracted light traces.\nYou can superimpose extracted light\ntraces on portraits or background images.

Shoot only extracted light traces.
You can superimpose extracted light
traces on portraits or background images.
You can set the exposure, etc.
Paint Time Sound
Light Painting
Light\nPainting
Paint Time
Creative
Shoots light traces drawn using penlights, etc. for the second shot.\nDraw light traces within the set paint time.\nAfter this step, only the light traces are displayed.
Shoots background or portrait images to be superimposed with light traces for the third shot.\nCheck the position of the displayed light trace when shooting.\nThe light paintings are complete.

Shoots light traces drawn using penlights, etc. for the second shot.
Draw light traces within the set paint time.
After this step, only the light traces are displayed.
You cannot change the exposure settings with the settings of the first shot.

Shoots background or portrait images to be superimposed with light traces for the third shot.
Check the position of the displayed light trace when shooting.
You can change the exposure settings with the settings of the first shot.
The light paintings are complete.
Cannot delete this image\nin this application.
Review
Changes the self-timer setting.
Will not use self-timer.
Self-Timer: Off
Cancel
Cancel
Images have been saved.
